message:
feat(compactor): enable compactor dog with configurable threshold (gt-l8dc)

The compactor dog code was fully implemented (commit 85887e88) but never
enabled in production config. This change:

- Lowers default commit threshold from 10,000 to 500 (appropriate for
  daily compaction)
- Makes threshold configurable via daemon.json compactor_dog.threshold
- Adds databases field to CompactorDogConfig so it does not piggyback on
  wisp_reaper config
- Enables compactor_dog in daemon.json for hq, beads, and gastown databases

Without automated compaction, every bd command pays increasing query tax
as the commit graph grows unbounded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
